subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and Testament! The Speaking Leaf perused thy letter, and its contents caused astonishment, though from one perspective [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و پیمان ورقه ناطقه ملاحظه کرد و مضامین سبب حیرت شد ولی از جهتی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @wisdom [hikmat], @firmness in the Covenant, @things are known by their opposites, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
